properties.query: select c.course_id, c.course_name, s.section_name, ct.content_name, ct.content_data from courses c left join sections s on c.course_id = s.course_id left join contents ct on s.course_id = ct.course_id;
INSERT INTO contents(course_id, section_id, content_name, content_data) VALUES (?,?,?,?);
